twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: When stress-tested on real conversations where Claude previously showed sycophancy, Opus 4.7 had half the sycophancy rate of Opus 4.6 on relationship guidance. Mythos Preview cut th
twitter_posts.description:
When stress-tested on real conversations where Claude previously showed sycophancy, Opus 4.7 had half the sycophancy rate of Opus 4.6 on relationship guidance. Mythos Preview cut that in half again. 

This generalized across domains—though this training is one of several causes.

articles.title: Production AI Playbook: Deterministic Steps & AI Steps
articles.description: Using AI for every workflow step isn't just unnecessary — it's slower, costlier, and less reliable when rule-based logic fits. This post covers practical patterns for combining deterministic and AI steps in n8n, with downloadable templates and hands-on exercises for each.
